2026-27 Men's Basketball Roster

12 Brooks Johnson

  • Position Forward
  • Class Sophomore
  • Height 6-6
  • Weight 215
  • Hometown Hermantown, Minn.
  • Prev School Duluth Marshall HS
  • Major Business
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

BEFORE UMD: Played for Duluth Marshall High School… listed as the No. 13-ranked prospect in the Minnesota 2025 class by Prep Hoops Minnesota… averaged 32.1 points, 16.6 rebounds, and 4.5 assists per game as a junior… surpassed the 2,000 career points mark during his junior season… played travel AAU basketball with both the MN Select and Starks Academy clubs during his prep career.
